Name: Systems Engineering CLI
Description: CLI tool for generating systems engineering artefacts from YAML definitions.

Name: Application Software
Description: Python application and its library dependencies.

Name: systems-engineering-diagrams
Description: Python package providing the CLI and all generation/verification logic.
Functions: Find Subtree, Filter Tree, Generate Functional D2, Generate Functional Markdown, Generate Functional CSV, Generate Product D2, Generate Product Markdown, Generate Product CSV, Verify Function Allocation, Argument Parsing, File Processing

Name: PyYAML
Description: Python library for parsing and emitting YAML.

Name: Rendering Engine
Description: External tool for rendering d2 diagram definitions to visual formats.

Name: d2
Description: Diagram scripting language tool that renders .d2 files to SVG and PNG.

Name: Development Tools
Description: Tools used for testing and validation during development.

Name: pytest
Description: Python test framework for running the test suite.

Name: yq
Description: Command-line YAML processor used in test scripts for validation.
